name: io.github.cmendezs/mcp-einvoicing-be
description: Belgian e-invoicing MCP server: Peppol BIS 3.0, UBL 2.1, PINT-BE (NBB), Mercurius.

environmentVariables.name: BCE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Belgian BCE/KBO enterprise database (optional — public endpoints work without it)

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO (default), WARNING, or ERROR
